changedFiles.mise.toml:
min_version = "2024.11.0"
ignored_config_paths = ["**/fixtures/**", "**/node_modules/**"]

[tools]
"npm:@fission-ai/openspec" = "0.23.0"
bun = "1.3.6"
node = "24.13.0"
pnpm = "10.28.1"
python = ["3.12", "3.11"]

[env]
FORCE_COLOR = "1"
NODE_OPTIONS = "--no-deprecation"
DATABASE_URL = "postgresql://localhost:5432/dev"

[settings]
pin = true
experimental = true
jobs = 4
verbose = false
task_output = "prefix"

[plugins]
elixir = "https://github.com/asdf-vm/asdf-elixir.git"

[tool_alias.node.versions]
lts = "22"
current = "24"

[shell_alias]
dev = "pnpm dev"
build = "pnpm build"
test = "pnpm test"

[tasks.dev]
description = "Start development server"
run = "pnpm dev"

[tasks.build]
description = "Build for production"
run = "pnpm build"
depends = ["test"]

[tasks.test]
description = "Run tests"
run = "pnpm test"
env = { CI = "true" }

[tasks.lint]
description = "Run linting"
run = ["pnpm lint", "pnpm format:check"]
